title: The Egghead Incident Begins
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Nami, Shanks, Unknown person #8, Shaka, Unknown person #9 as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
scene: The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have an idea where Stella might be located.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Get out of our damn way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We're in a bit of a rush!

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: Don't think of him as a kid!!

dialogue.speaker: Shaka
dialogue.text: You beat Edison half to death...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're not cute at all!! You're nothing like a kid!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're right, NAM! Don't hold back! Just close your eyes!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Push me out and leave the rest to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami, get out of there! He's coming up from below you!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Betrayal through 22 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
